title: Pork Skewers with Smoky Glaze
description: A flavor-packed dish of marinated pork skewers smothered in a sweet and smoky glaze.

ingredients.name: pork (shoulder or butt), cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together barbecue sauce, soy sauce, brown sugar, garlic, and smoky.
Add the pork cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated pork cubes onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the crumbly crumbs onto both sides of the pork.
Brush the cooking oil onto the pork skewers.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
Transfer the skewers to a serving platter and brush with additional barbecue sauce if desired.
